steps.title: Substitute x = 47 into the model
steps.content: The predicted number of larvae is $y = 0.68x + 2.4$ for $25 \leq x \leq 115$. With $x = 47$ (within range), substitute: $$y = 0.68(47) + 2.4.$$

steps.title: Evaluate each choice
steps.content:
• A: $34$. Closest to $34.36$ (difference $0.36$). Correct.
  • B: $50$. Too large (difference $15.64$); would require $x = 70$.
  • C: $66$. Far too large; would require $x \approx 94$.
  • D: $155$. Way off; the maximum predicted larvae at $x=115$ is only $\approx 81$.
That matches Choice A — 34.
